item.title: Blueprint loader + validator
item.intent: Load and validate any blueprint YAML — built-in or community — rejecting malformed input with clear errors. This is the read path the entire blueprint engine depends on.
item.description: BLUEPRINT ENGINE FOUNDATION: The loader is the reading end of the blueprint system. Without it, 'clawhq blueprint list/preview' (FEAT-001) and the init wizard (CQ-010) have nothing to work with. 70+ validation checks mean a malformed community blueprint can't corrupt the user's setup. Acceptance: all built-in blueprints load cleanly; invalid YAML surfaces readable error; size limit prevents DoS on large files; templateToChoice() works correctly for wizard display.
steps: Implement YAML blueprint loader from configs/templates/
Add 70+ validation checks for blueprint correctness
Enforce security baseline requirements in blueprints
Implement templateToChoice() conversion for wizard display
acceptanceCriteria: All built-in blueprints load without errors
Invalid YAML surfaces readable error message
Size limit prevents DoS on oversized blueprint files
templateToChoice() produces correct wizard display data
